prestazioni: Engine: M112 E32 3.2L V6 (218 HP stock) – Forced induction via Rotrex C38-91 supercharger (12 psi max boost) with custom intercooler setup (GReddy Type-S front-mount, 600x300x100mm core) and upgraded fuel system (Bosch 044 fuel pump, Siemens DEKA 80lb/hr injectors, AEM X-Series wideband AFR gauge for precise tuning).

Drivetrain: Quaife ATB LSD (part # QDF7J) for the W203 rear axle, paired with a Spec Stage 3+ clutch (organic/metallic hybrid) and lightweight aluminum flywheel (South Bend Clutch, 12.5lb). Transmission reinforcement via Mercedes-Benz Motorsport W5A 580 5-speed transmission (OEM+ upgrade, part # A2032701500) with Red Line MT-90 fluid.

Suspension & Handling: KW Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable, 24-way rebound, 16-way compression, 12-way preload) with custom valving for W203 chassis, paired with H&R 25mm front / 20mm rear sway bars (part # 546 550 00 / 546 551 00). Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers (355mm discs, part # 09.9404.11) and 4-piston rear calipers (330mm discs, part # 09.9404.71) with Ferodo DS2500 pads.
estetica: Body: Rocket Bunny V1 W203 widebody kit (Pandem Design, fiberglass construction) with custom front splitter (carbon fiber, 3D-scanned for W203 bumper) and rear diffuser (Rieger Tuning, aluminum). Full respray in Mercedes-Benz Designo Mystic White (code 144) with matte black accents (3M 1080 Wrap, Satin Black).

Wheels: BBS LM-R (18x9.5 ET25 front, 18x10.5 ET30 rear) with custom offsets for W203 fender clearance, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/35/18 front, 275/30/18 rear). OEM+ wheel spacers (H&R Trak+ 15mm front, 25mm rear) for flush fitment.

Interior: Recaro Pole Position seats (cloth/Alcantara, part # 389 000 01 00) with Schroth Profi II 4-point harnesses. Custom roll cage (Custom Cages UK, T45 steel, 6-point bolt-in) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360, 2kg extinguisher). MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede) with quick-release hub (NRG Innovations).
